articles.author: Katey Psencik, Mary Wasson, Julianna Duennes Russ, Faith Bugenhagen, Dante Motley, San Antonio Express-News Staff
articles.title: At least 2 dead, hundreds rescued as flooding devastates parts of Texas - Austin American-Statesman
articles.description: At least two people died and hundreds were rescued Thursday as dangerous flooding swept across the Texas Hill Country.
articles.content:
People gather to watch as the Perdenales River floods Ranch Road 1623 in Stonewall, Thursday, July 16, 2026.
Mikala Compton/Austin American-Statesman
